title: rubus titanus
intro: Rubus titanus, also known as the giant bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus titanus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from digestive issues. Rubus titanus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in the form of dried leaves and roots, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
